hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -q '/data/' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Do not write to data/ directly. Use `yerba` commands (see. `bundle exec yerba --help`) or the Yerba Ruby API via `require 'yerba'`, `Yerba.parse(source)`, or `Yerba.parse_file(path)`."}' || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -q 'lib/schemas/' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Do not edit files in lib/schemas/ directly. They are auto-generated. Edit the Ruby schema in app/schemas/*.rb instead, then run: bin/rails schema:export"}' || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -qE 'YAML\.(load_file|load|parse|safe_load|dump)|\.(to_yaml)' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Do not use YAML.load_file, YAML.dump, or .to_yaml for data files. Use Yerba.parse_file to read and doc.save! to write, preserving formatting, comments, and whitespace."}' || true
